_comment: Field map for FNMA Form 1073 â€” Individual Condominium Unit Appraisal.
_calibration: HOW TO CALIBRATE: 1) Open ACI with a 1073 report loaded. 2) Start desktop_agent/agent.py. 3) Run: python desktop_agent/calibrate_aci.py â€” copy automation_id and class_name/class_index values from the output. 4) POST http://localhost:5180/reload-maps to apply. 5) Run: python _test_aci_live.py 1073 to verify.

_schema.label: Human-readable field label (used for label-match fallback)
_schema.automation_id: UIA AutomationId â€” MOST RELIABLE. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_name: Windows class name for RichEdit controls (e.g. 'RichEdit20W'). Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_index: 0-based index among controls of this class_name. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.control_index: 0-based index among ALL text-input controls. Fill in from /calibrate output as fallback.
